## Scope and guardrails

- [ ] No financial logic change, unless explicitly intended and reviewed.
- [ ] No DCF math change.
- [ ] No fair value logic change.
- [ ] No model rating/confidence/signal behavior change.
- [ ] No live fetching, unless explicitly intended and reviewed.
- [ ] No new company data, unless explicitly scoped.
- [ ] No price targets.
- [ ] No buy/sell/hold recommendations.
- [ ] No personal investment advice.
- [ ] No trading, portfolio, broker, or order behavior.
- [ ] No framework-specific business logic in the deterministic core.
